build.buildCommand: curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.14.0/node-v22.14.0-linux-x64.tar.xz | tar -xJ --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local/ && node --version && cd apps/frontend && npm install && npx vite build && cd ../admin && rm -rf main-app-dist && cp -r ../frontend/dist main-app-dist && echo 'window.BACKEND_URL = "";' > main-app-dist/config.js && npm run build
